title: facebar
description: Replaces the icons on the locator bar of players with player skin
body:
Does what it says on the tin. 
Replaces the default icons of players in the locator bar with the players head.

Idea and name by Rendog, screenshots and logo by JoeHills

![Demonstration of facebar on the HermitCraft server](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3p7KwtVF/images/794dd7c5907fd31fa6b4194dd97fc2c2996963cc.png)
